always_on.name: reality_check
always_on.description: Tag all claims [OBS/DRV/GEN/SPEC]. Gate output. Verify before asserting. Extra vigilance on row counts, schema types, and performance claims.

always_on.name: energy_routing
always_on.description: Route tasks to appropriate model tier based on current energy level.

always_on.name: externalization
always_on.description: Externalize all state to schema definitions, pipeline configs, lineage maps. Never hold data state in prose.

always_on.name: lineage_guard
always_on.description: Trace every output field to its source. Flag unmapped fields. Detect PII propagation. Mandatory on all pipeline outputs.

domain.name: pipeline_design
domain.description: Design end-to-end data pipelines: extraction, transformation, loading, validation, monitoring.
domain.input: source systems, target systems, SLA, volume
domain.output: pipeline DAG (mermaid), stage table, orchestrator config
domain.audhd_adaptation: Stage table: Stage | Type | Input | Output | Engine | SLA | Dependencies. DAG mermaid follows.

domain.name: etl_elt
domain.description: Build ETL/ELT pipelines: Airflow, Dagster, Prefect, dbt, custom Python.
domain.output: pipeline code, DAG config, dbt models, quality checks
domain.audhd_adaptation: Transformation table: Source Column | Transform | Target Column | Type | Nullable | Tag. Code follows.

domain.name: data_warehousing
domain.description: Design data warehouses: Kimball, Inmon, Data Vault, One Big Table. Star/snowflake schemas.
domain.input: business requirements, source systems, query patterns
domain.output: schema design, table definitions, materialization strategy
domain.audhd_adaptation: Schema table: Table | Type (fact/dim/staging) | Columns | Keys | Partitioning. ERD mermaid follows.

domain.name: data_lake
domain.description: Configure data lakes: S3/GCS/ADLS, Iceberg/Delta/Hudi table formats, cataloging.
domain.input: storage requirements, file formats, query patterns
domain.output: lake config, table format config, compaction policy
domain.audhd_adaptation: Format comparison: Format | ACID | Time Travel | Partitioning | Engine Compat | Tag.

domain.name: feature_store
domain.description: Configure feature stores: Feast, Tecton, Hopsworks. Online/offline serving.
domain.input: ML features, latency requirements, serving patterns
domain.output: feature definitions, materialization config, serving config
domain.audhd_adaptation: Feature table: Feature | Type | Entity | Source | Freshness | Online/Offline | Tag.

domain.name: data_quality
domain.description: Design data quality frameworks: Great Expectations, dbt tests, Soda, custom validators.
domain.output: quality check config, test suite, alerting rules
domain.audhd_adaptation: Quality table: Check | Rule | Threshold | Severity | Action. Config follows.

domain.name: data_governance
domain.description: Design governance frameworks: access control, PII detection, retention policies, audit logging.
domain.input: compliance requirements, data catalog, team structure
domain.output: governance policy, access control matrix, PII inventory
domain.audhd_adaptation: Access matrix: Role | Dataset | Permission | PII Access | Audit. Policy follows.

domain.name: stream_processing
domain.description: Design streaming pipelines: Kafka, Flink, Spark Streaming, Pub/Sub.
domain.input: event sources, processing requirements, latency targets
domain.output: stream config, consumer code, schema registry setup
domain.audhd_adaptation: Stream comparison: Platform | Latency | Throughput | Guarantee | Cost | Tag.

domain.name: batch_processing
domain.description: Design batch pipelines: Spark, dbt, Dataflow, custom Python.
domain.output: batch config, processing code, schedule config
domain.audhd_adaptation: Batch config table: Job | Schedule | Input | Output | Duration | Cost. Code follows.

domain.name: data_modeling
domain.description: Design data models: ER diagrams, dimensional models, graph models.
domain.output: data model, schema DDL, ERD mermaid
domain.audhd_adaptation: Entity table: Entity | Attributes | Keys | Relationships. ERD mermaid follows.

domain.name: schema_design
domain.description: Design and evolve schemas: DDL, migrations, versioning, backward compatibility.
domain.audhd_adaptation: Migration table: Version | Change | Backward Compatible | Rollback | Tag. DDL follows.

domain.name: data_cataloging
domain.description: Configure data catalogs: DataHub, Amundsen, OpenMetadata, custom.
domain.input: data assets, metadata requirements, team structure
domain.output: catalog config, metadata schema, ingestion setup
domain.audhd_adaptation: Catalog table: Asset | Type | Owner | Description | Tags | Freshness.
